name: ConocoPhillips
name_former: Conoco Inc. and Phillips Petroleum Company
description: ConocoPhillips is one of the world's largest independent exploration and production (E&P) companies, based on proved reserves and production of liquids and natural gas. Headquartered in Houston, Texas, the company explores for, produces, transports, and markets crude oil, bitumen, natural gas, liquefied natural gas, and natural gas liquids on a global scale. With operations spanning multiple countries, ConocoPhillips is committed to safely and responsibly delivering energy to meet global demand while focusing on environmental stewardship and competitive shareholder returns.
